true_desc_levels.1: Attacks an enemy. \nIf the caster has <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color>, activates an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks an enemy. \nIf the caster has <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color>, activates an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks an enemy. \nIf the caster has <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color>, activates an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks an enemy. \nIf the caster has <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color>, activates an <color=#28d9ed>enhanced attack</color>.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks an enemy.\nIf the caster has <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color>, triggers an <color=#28d9ed>Enhanced Attack</color> and reduces the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Sanctuary for All</color> by <color=#28d9ed>1</color> turn.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>がある場合、 このスキルが強化され、<color=#28d9ed>ダメージがUP</color>する。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>がある場合、 このスキルが強化され、<color=#28d9ed>ダメージがUP</color>する。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>がある場合、 このスキルが強化され、<color=#28d9ed>ダメージがUP</color>する。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>がある場合、 このスキルが強化され、<color=#28d9ed>ダメージがUP</color>する。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: 敵単体にダメージを与える。\n<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>がある場合、<color=#28d9ed>強化攻撃</color>が発生し、<color=#28d9ed>【万物にありては安息】</color>のスキルターンが<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>DOWNされる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color> 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color> 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color> 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color> 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: 적을 공격합니다.\n<color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color> 보유 시 <color=#28d9ed>강화 공격</color>이 발생하고 <color=#28d9ed>만물에게 안식을</color>의 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 감소합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击敌人。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: 攻击敌人。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。
true_desc_levels.3_zh: 攻击敌人。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。
true_desc_levels.4_zh: 攻击敌人。\n附带<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果时,触发<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: 攻击敌人。\n若持有<color=#28d9ed>模型庭院的管理者</color>,发动<color=#28d9ed>强化攻击</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>赐万物安息</color>的冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

5_jp: 【万物にありては安息】のスキルターン-1ターン
5_zh: 赐万物安息冷却时间-1回合

SKT_BURST_1.effect_zh: 获得模型庄园的管理者+1回合\n伤害提升

SKT_BURST_3.effect: Resets all skill cooldowns\Speed Increase +1 turn
SKT_BURST_3.effect_jp: 全スキルのスキルターン初期化\nスピード+1ターン
SKT_BURST_3.effect_zh: 重置所有技能冷却时间\n速度+1回合

true_desc_levels.1: (Triggered Effect) <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects</color> and heals for <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> upon death. <color=#28d9ed>Dies</color> if no enemy is slain in <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\nGrants the caster <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> upon resurrection.
true_desc_levels.2: (Triggered Effect) <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects</color> and heals for <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> upon death. <color=#28d9ed>Dies</color> if no enemy is slain in <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\nGrants the caster <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> upon resurrection.
true_desc_levels.3: (Triggered Effect) <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects</color> and heals for <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> upon death. <color=#28d9ed>Dies</color> if no enemy is slain in <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\nGrants the caster <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> upon resurrection.
true_desc_levels.4: (Triggered Effect) <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects</color> and heals for <color=#28d9ed>35%</color> upon death. <color=#28d9ed>Dies</color> if no enemy is slain in <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\nGrants the caster <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color> and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> upon resurrection.
true_desc_levels.5: (Triggered Effect) <color=#28d9ed>Resurrects</color> and heals for <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> upon death. <color=#28d9ed>Dies</color> if no enemy is slain in <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>.\nGrants the caster <color=#28d9ed>Doll Garden's Caretaker</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn</color>, resets the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Sanctuary for All</color>, and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> upon resurrection.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: (発動効果)倒れた時、直ちに自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復して<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>する。敵を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間に倒せなかった場合、自分が<color=#28d9ed>倒れる。</color>\n復活時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.2_jp: (発動効果)倒れた時、直ちに自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復して<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>する。敵を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間に倒せなかった場合、自分が<color=#28d9ed>倒れる。</color>\n復活時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
true_desc_levels.3_jp: (発動効果)倒れた時、直ちに自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>回復して<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>する。敵を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間に倒せなかった場合、自分が<color=#28d9ed>倒れる。</color>\n復活時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.4_jp: (発動効果)倒れた時、直ちに自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>回復して<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>する。敵を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間に倒せなかった場合、自分が<color=#28d9ed>倒れる。</color>\n復活時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.5_jp: (発動効果)倒れた時、直ちに自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>回復して<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>する。敵を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間に倒せなかった場合、自分が<color=#28d9ed>倒れる。</color>\n復活時、自分に<color=#28d9ed>【箱庭の主】</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与し、<color=#28d9ed>【万物にありては安息】</color>のスキルターンを初期化する。また、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>UPさせる。
true_desc_levels.1_kr: (발동 효과) 사망 시 즉시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>의 체력을 회복하며 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color>합니다. <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적을 처치하지 못하면 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>하게 됩니다.\n부활 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color>를 획득합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: (발동 효과) 사망 시 즉시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>의 체력을 회복하며 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color>합니다. <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적을 처치하지 못하면 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>하게 됩니다.\n부활 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color>를 획득합니다.
true_desc_levels.3_kr: (발동 효과) 사망 시 즉시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color>의 체력을 회복하며 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color>합니다. <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적을 처치하지 못하면 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>하게 됩니다.\n부활 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color>를 획득하고, <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.4_kr: (발동 효과) 사망 시 즉시 <color=#28d9ed>35%</color>의 체력을 회복하며 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color>합니다. <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적을 처치하지 못하면 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>하게 됩니다.\n부활 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color>를 획득하고, <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.5_kr: (발동 효과) 사망 시 즉시 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color>의 체력을 회복하며 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color>합니다. <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 적을 처치하지 못하면 <color=#28d9ed>사망</color>하게 됩니다.\n부활 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>모형 정원의 관리자</color>를 획득하고, <color=#28d9ed>만물에게 안식을</color>의 쿨타임이 초기화 됩니다. 추가로 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>80%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.1_zh: (触发效果)死亡时,立即恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>生命值并<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。若<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内无法击杀敌人则会<color=#28d9ed>死亡</color>。\n复活时,会获得<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.2_zh: (触发效果)死亡时,立即恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>生命值并<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。若<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内无法击杀敌人则会<color=#28d9ed>死亡</color>。\n复活时,会获得<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
true_desc_levels.3_zh: (触发效果)死亡时,立即恢复<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>生命值并<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。若<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内无法击杀敌人则会<color=#28d9ed>死亡</color>。\n复活时,会获得<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>。
true_desc_levels.4_zh: (触发效果)死亡时,立即恢复<color=#28d9ed>35%</color>生命值并<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。若<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内无法击杀敌人则会<color=#28d9ed>死亡</color>。\n复活时,会获得<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>。
true_desc_levels.5_zh: (触发效果)死亡时,立即恢复<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>生命值并<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。若<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>内无法击杀敌人则会<color=#28d9ed>死亡</color>。\n复活时,会获得<color=#28d9ed>模型庄园的管理者</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>,重置<color=#28d9ed>赋予万物安息</color>的冷却时间,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>额外提升<color=#28d9ed>80%</color>。

5_jp: 【万物にありては安息】のスキルターン初期化
5_zh: 赋予万物安息冷却时间重置

true_desc_levels.1: Attacks all enemies.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of targets' Defense, deals more damage when fewer enemies remain (up to 60%),\nand increases damage by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> each time an enemy is defeated.
true_desc_levels.2: Attacks all enemies.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of targets' Defense, deals more damage when fewer enemies remain (up to 60%),\nand increases damage by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> each time an enemy is defeated.
true_desc_levels.3: Attacks all enemies.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of targets' Defense, deals more damage when fewer enemies remain (up to 60%),\nand increases damage by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> each time an enemy is defeated.
true_desc_levels.4: Attacks all enemies.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of targets' Defense, deals more damage when fewer enemies remain (up to 60%),\nand increases damage by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> each time an enemy is defeated.
true_desc_levels.5: Attacks all enemies.\nThis skill ignores <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> of targets' Defense, deals more damage when fewer enemies remain (up to 60%),\nand increases damage by <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> each time an enemy is defeated.
true_desc_levels.1_jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは対象の防御力を<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>無視し、対象数が少ないほどダメージが増加する(最大60%)。\nまた、敵が倒れるたびにダメージが<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>増加する。

true_desc_levels.1_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 대상의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시하며 대상의 수가 적을수록 피해가 증가하고(최대 60%)\n사망자가 발생할 때마다 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 증가합니다.
true_desc_levels.2_kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n이 스킬은 대상의 방어력을 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 무시하며 대상의 수가 적을수록 피해가 증가하고(최대 60%)\n사망자가 발생할 때마다 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>5%</color> 증가합니다.

true_desc_levels.1_zh: 攻击全体敌人。\n该技能无视目标<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>防御力,敌人数量越少伤害越高(最多60%),\n且每当有敌人死亡时,伤害提高<color=#28d9ed>5%</color>。
